Get IMPACT annotation key

Source: R/IMPACT_get_annotation_key.R
IMPACT_get_annotation_key.Rd

Includes the study source, tissue, cell type/line, and cell subtype of each of the 500 annotations in IMPACT.

IMPACT_get_annotation_key(
  URL = paste0("https://github.com/immunogenomics/IMPACT/",
    "raw/master/IMPACT707/IMPACT_annotation_key.txt"),
  save_path = "./IMPACT/IMPACT_annotation_key.txt.gz",
  save_key = FALSE,
  force_new_download = FALSE,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

URL

URL to the IMPACT annotation key file.

save_path

Local path to save the annotation key.

save_key

Whether to save the annotation key locally.

force_new_download

Whether to force re-downloading even if a local copy exists.

verbose

Print messages.

Value

A data.table with annotation metadata.

See also

Other IMPACT: IMPACT_compute_enrichment(), IMPACT_files, IMPACT_get_annotations(), IMPACT_get_ldscores(), IMPACT_get_top_annotations(), IMPACT_heatmap(), IMPACT_iterate_enrichment(), IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations(), IMPACT_plot_enrichment(), IMPACT_plot_impact_score(), IMPACT_postprocess_annotations(), IMPACT_process(), IMPACT_query(), IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot(), hierarchical_colors(), prepare_mat_meta()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
annot_key <- IMPACT_get_annotation_key(save_key = FALSE)
head(annot_key)
} # }

Contents
